title: crocus ochroleucus
intro: Crocus ochroleucus, also known as the lemon crocus or yellow crocus, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant contains colchicine, a medicinally important alkaloid that has been used to treat gout, arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal medicine, Crocus ochroleucus is valued for its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as joint pain and digestive issues. Crocus ochroleucus is often prepared as a tincture or dried root, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
